exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your meal planning forward
items: Have a family meeting to discuss dietary preferences, food allergies, and meal expectations for everyone in your household
Create a shared grocery shopping list with your partner or housemates and establish who will be responsible for which items or shopping trips
Schedule a monthly meal planning meeting with your household members to review what worked, what didn\
Talk with your family about establishing meal preparation and cleanup responsibilities, creating a rotating schedule that works for everyone\
Communicate with your household about creating meal backup plans for busy days, discussing quick meal options and emergency food strategies that everyone can execute
Schedule a conversation with family members or housemates about sharing meal planning decisions, discussing how to rotate who chooses weekly dinner themes or special meals
